cve.title: CVE-2026-6657 - CORS Origin Validation Bypass in jupyter-server
cve.contentSnippet: A vulnerability in jupyter-server versions 1.12.0 through 2.17.0 allows an attacker to bypass CORS origin validation when the `allow_origin_pat` configuration is used. The issue arises from the use of `re.match()` for validating the `Origin` header, which only anchors at the star

cve.title: CVE-2026-44281 - GLPI vulnerable to unauthorized reading of a specific asset object
cve.contentSnippet: GLPI is a free asset and IT management software package. Starting in version 0.78 and prior to versions 10.0.25 and 11.0.7, an authenticated user with config READ permission can read a specific asset object. Upgrade to 11.0.7 or 10.0.25 to receive a patch.

cve.title: CVE-2026-42321 - GLPI has stored XSS in asset locks
cve.contentSnippet: GLPI is a free asset and IT management software package. Starting in version 10.0.4 and prior to version 10.0.25, a technician can store an XSS payload in the asset locked tab. Upgrade to 10.0.25 or 11.0.7 to receive a patch.

cve.title: CVE-2026-42320 - GLPI vulnerable to arbitrary file access
cve.contentSnippet: GLPI is a free asset and IT management software package. Starting in version 0.50 and prior to versions 10.0.25 and 11.0.7, a technician can read arbitrary files inside the GLPI_DOC_DIR. Upgrade to 10.0.25 or 11.0.7 to receive a patch.

cve.title: CVE-2026-42318 - GLPI Vulnerable to Arbitrary Item Deletion via Planning Endpoint
cve.contentSnippet: GLPI is a free asset and IT management software package. Starting in version 9.5.0 and prior to versions 10.0.25 and 11.0.7, low privilege users with access to planning can delete any object in GLPI. Upgrade to 11.0.7 or 10.0.25 to receive a patch. As a workaround, disable delete

cve.title: CVE-2026-42317 - GLPI vulnerable to arbitrary files deletion by technician
cve.contentSnippet: GLPI is a free asset and IT management software package. Starting in version 0.78 and prior to versions 10.0.25 and 11.0.7, a technician can delete arbitrary files from the filesystem as long as the webserver has write rights on them. Upgrade to 10.0.25 or 11.0.7 to receive a pat

cve.title: CVE-2026-3276 - Potential DoS via quadratic complexity in unicodedata.normalize()
cve.contentSnippet: unicodedata.normalize() can take excessive CPU time when processing specially crafted Unicode input containing long runs of combining characters with alternating Canonical Combining Class values. This affects all normalization forms.

cve.title: CVE-2026-37462 - gobgp: BGPUpdate.DecodeFromBytes Integer Underflow Denial of Service
cve.contentSnippet: An integer underflow in the BGPUpdate.DecodeFromBytes function (/bgp/bgp.go) of gobgp v4.3.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted BGP UPDATE message.

cve.title: CVE-2026-36748 - RockRMS Cross-Site Scripting
cve.contentSnippet: RockRMS v16.13 and before v.17.7.0 is vulnerable to Cross Site Scripting (XSS) via Social Media links in user profile.

cve.title: CVE-2026-36576 - openlabs docker-wkhtmltopdf-aas OS Command Injection
cve.contentSnippet: An OS command injection vulnerability in the app.py component of openlabs docker-wkhtmltopdf-aas up to commit 9f50579 allows attackers to execute arbitrary commands via a crafted POST request.

cve.title: CVE-2026-36574 - Wassimulator CactusViewer DLL Hijacking Privilege Escalation
cve.contentSnippet: A DLL hijacking vulnerability in Wassimulator (GitHub) CactusViewer v2.3.0 allows attackers to escalate privileges and execute arbitrary code via a crafted DLL.

Versions prior to 5.0.13, 4.1.69, and 4.0.63 are vulnerable to cross-site scripting. An attacker could conduct

cve.title: CVE-2026-8404 - Potential exposure of private data via case-sensitive Cache-Control directives in UpdateCacheMiddleware
cve.contentSnippet: An issue was discovered in Django 5.2 before 5.2.15 and 6.0 before 6.0.6. `django.middleware.cache.UpdateCacheMiddleware` in Django does not match `Cache-Control` response directives case-insensitively, which allows remote attackers to read responses that were incorrectly cached

cve.title: CVE-2026-7666 - Potential unencrypted email transmission via STARTTLS in the SMTP backend

cve.title: CVE-2026-6873 - Signed cookie salt namespace collision in django.http.HttpRequest.get_signed_cookie
cve.contentSnippet: An issue was discovered in Django 6.0 before 6.0.6 and 5.2 before 5.2.15. `django.http.HttpRequest.get_signed_cookie` in Django uses a non-injective salt derivation (concatenating the cookie name and salt argument), which allows a remote attacker to use a cookie in a context diff

cve.title: CVE-2026-5241 - Policy Bypass in LightGlue Nested Config Resolution in huggingface/transformers
cve.contentSnippet: A vulnerability in the LightGlue model loading path of huggingface/transformers version 5.2.0 allows an attacker-controlled model repository to execute arbitrary code during model initialization. The issue arises because the `trust_remote_code` parameter, intended to prevent remo

cve.title: CVE-2026-48587 - Potential exposure of private data via whitespace padding in Vary header
cve.contentSnippet: An issue was discovered in Django 5.2 before 5.2.15 and 6.0 before 6.0.6. `django.utils.cache.has_vary_header()` in Django does not strip leading or trailing whitespace from `Vary` response header values before comparison, which allows remote attackers to read cached responses vi

cve.title: CVE-2026-47325 - Weak password policy in ProjectsAndPrograms school-management-system
cve.contentSnippet: ProjectsAndPrograms school-management-system uses predictable credentials by generating student's and teacher's passwords solely from the user’s date of birth (e.g., 12072000 for 12 July 2000). The application does not require or prompt users to change the password upon first log

cve.contentSnippet: ProjectsAndPrograms school-management-system is vulnerable to Stored Cross‑Site Scripting (XSS) in multiple attributes of students and teachers objects. cve.title: CVE-2026-44546 - Header injection via WebSocket upgrade parser differential allows ASGI scope header spoofing
cve.contentSnippet: daphne before 4.2.2 reconstructs a raw HTTP request from Twisted's parsed headers and feeds it to autobahn for WebSocket handshake processing. Twisted does not treat \x0b, \x0c, \x1c, \x1d, \x1e, or \x85 as header line separators, but autobahn decodes header values to str and cal

cve.title: CVE-2026-44545 - Unbounded WebSocket message and frame sizes can cause unauthenticated remote denial of service
cve.contentSnippet: daphne before 4.2.2 did not pass maxFramePayloadSize or maxMessagePayloadSize to Autobahn's WebSocketServerFactory. Because Autobahn defaults both values to 0 (unlimited), an unauthenticated remote attacker could send arbitrarily large WebSocket messages or frames, causing excess

cve.title: CVE-2026-37460 - FRRouting BGP UPDATE Denial of Service
cve.contentSnippet: Missing input validation in the rfapiRibBi2Ri() function (rfapi_rib.c) of FRRouting (FRR) stable/10.0 to stable/10.6 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted BGP UPDATE message.
